title: PFM-MEFMRI: Multi-echo fMRI preprocessing and denoising pipeline for precision functional mapping
description: PFM-MEFMRI is a modular, configuration-driven multi-echo fMRI preprocessing and denoising pipeline for precision functional mapping and individual-level functional connectivity analysis. The pipeline supports standardized subject-directory layouts, raw scanner export and BIDS import workflows, multi-echo preprocessing, denoising, quality-assurance outputs, and optional integration with PFM-NSI.
